name: @molten-ai/mypos-connect-api-description
description: Unofficial API description and validation tooling used to generate the MyPOS Connect SDK

scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "throw new Error('Do not publish this API-description repository; publish the generated SDK from Molten-Bot/mypos-connect-typescript')"
scripts.validate: pnpm run lint:openapi && pnpm run test && pnpm run docs:typecheck
